text: Hello, are you struggling to put on your shoes?
Well here is me and I'm going to help you to put on your shoes.
First of all, pick the right pair of shoes.
For example, I'm not used to wearing women's shoes and it is very difficult for me to put these on.
It causes me to fall over.
And these shoes are absolutely too big for me.
I cannot walk around in these or they will come off.
Whereas these shoes, they are too small and I just cannot put them on.
I am a size two and a half. To check what size you are, go to class and ask the lady at the tip
and she will be very good to you and she will help you know your size.
So, what you have to do, to know what foot you are, the right foot, which is this my right and this is my left,
that is your right and that is your left.
So, the inside has to be facing to the middle in both shoes.
So what you have to do, you have to pull the thing with all your might, pull it again with all your might
and pull the tongue out.
Oops, I put it out.
You have to put it back in the hole and then put the tongue up and go like this.
It's a very hard job by the way.
I am glad if I helped you put on your shoes.
Thank you for watching.
